lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order and has been meticulously maintained.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear, such as small scratches. The interior is clean with light signs of use. Mechanically, the car is sound and has been well-maintained.

Get ready to hit the road in this well-maintained beauty! This car is in good overall shape and has been clearly cared for, showing only minor signs of regular use that you'd expect from a well-loved vehicle. It's a reliable and attractive ride that's ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately!

This vehicle is in absolute mint, showroom condition, having been meticulously stored and maintained to the highest standards. The exterior paint is entirely flawless, retaining its original factory luster without a single scratch, chip, or swirl mark. Inside, the cabin is pristine and retains its new-car scent, with no signs of wear on the upholstery, dashboard, or carpets. Mechanically, the car is perfect, providing a driving experience identical to the day it was first delivered, with all systems functioning exactly as intended. This is a rare, collector-quality example for a discerning buyer who expects nothing less than perfection.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a reliable choice for a daily commuter. While it runs and drives well, it does show its age with some visible wear and tear. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger door, and the interior upholstery shows some staining and minor tearing in the driver's seat. Mechanically, the engine is solid, but the air conditioning takes a few minutes to get cold, and the brakes will likely need servicing within the next few thousand miles. It’s a functional, honest car for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

Presenting a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and consistent performance. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our standards for safety and reliability. While reflecting standard signs of careful use, the powertrain remains robust and the cabin remains well-appointed. This represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle at a competitive market price.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for any adventure? This car has been so good to me and is still in great shape for its next owner! It’s super comfortable, drives smoothly, and has been well-loved and maintained over the years. It’s perfect for someone who wants a solid, dependable vehicle without the brand-new price tag. Come say hi and take it for a test drive—you're going to love how it handles!

Available is a driver-focused 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 inline-six power plant. This example has been maintained with a focus on mechanical longevity, including addressed rod bearings and a comprehensive subframe reinforcement kit. The engine exhibits strong compression across all cylinders, and the Double VANOS system remains quiet and responsive throughout the rev range. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has been enhanced with polyurethane bushings and Bilstein dampers, ensuring optimal suspension geometry under high lateral loads. While the exterior displays minor road patina consistent with regular use, the drivetrain remains exceptionally tight and free of fluid leaks. A mechanically sound specimen for the enthusiast who prioritizes tactile feedback and engine harmonics.
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Recent maintenance completed. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in reliable, road-ready condition. The exterior paint retains a deep shine, showing only minor signs of use such as light stone chips on the front fascia and a small, superficial scuff on the passenger-side door handle. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the leather seating is supple with no rips or thinning, and all interior electronics—including the navigation system, heated seats, and sunroof—are fully operational. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly with a consistent idle, and the transmission shifts through all gears without hesitation. I have kept a detailed log of all oil changes and fluid flushes performed at recommended intervals. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the brake pads were replaced within the last six months. This car offers a balanced blend of performance and comfort for a buyer looking for a well-cared-for daily driver.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a refined and dependable driving experience. The exterior retains a sophisticated finish, complemented by a well-appointed interior that ensures both comfort and style. An exemplary choice for those who demand performance and lasting value.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and showing pride of ownership, it delivers a refined driving experience and reliable mechanical integrity. With its clean presentation and proven durability, this model stands as a sophisticated choice for those who demand quality without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-taken care of over the years. It's a reliable daily driver that still looks fantastic on the road! I’m sad to see it go, but I know it’ll make the next owner very happy. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Available is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 powerhouse. This high-revving 3.2L inline-six utilizes individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver linear power up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is routed through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock for optimal traction. The chassis remains taut with documented subframe reinforcement, while the suspension geometry provides the communicative steering feedback synonymous with the marque. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and shim-and-bucket valve adjustment, ensuring the valvetrain remains within factory tolerances. This is a driver-focused example primed for spirited engagement.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Runs well. No major issues.

This vehicle is an exceptional example of well-maintained quality, offering a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish with only minor, negligible wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of cleanliness; the premium upholstery is supple and free of tears, while all electronic features, from the responsive infotainment system to the climate control, function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, having undergone regular servicing to ensure the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision. It delivers a quiet, composed ride that inspires confidence on both city streets and long highway hauls. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exemplary fusion of sophisticated engineering and proven durability. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by mechanical precision and aesthetic integrity. A premier selection for those who demand uncompromising quality and exceptional value in a pre-owned investment.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a seamless blend of performance and sophisticated styling. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure continued reliability and roadworthiness. This is an exemplary choice for those seeking premium quality and long-term value.

It drives like a dream and has been well-loved, so it's ready to hit the road with you today. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and double VANOS for optimized volumetric efficiency across the powerband. The chassis has been maintained with a focus on mechanical longevity, including a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings to preserve the platform's legendary lateral kinematics. Power is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox and a limited-slip differential, providing exceptional tactile feedback and traction out of corners. The suspension features upgraded dampers for improved rebound characteristics, while the braking system remains firm with braided stainless lines. While showing minor cosmetic patina expected of a driver-focused machine, the powertrain remains robust with consistent compression and a linear torque curve. A mechanically sound example of an analog performance icon.
Well-maintained vehicle. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Ready for immediate use.

This 2019 Audi Q5 Premium Plus has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition. The exterior features a deep Moonlight Blue Metallic finish that still catches the light beautifully, complemented by 19-inch 5-arm-wing design wheels. Inside, the Atlas Beige leather interior is clean and smoke-free, with the panoramic sunroof providing an airy feel to the cabin. Technology-wise, it’s fully equipped with the Audi Virtual Cockpit, a crisp MMI navigation plus system, and a premium Bang & Olufsen sound system. Mechanically, the 2.0T engine delivers smooth, responsive power, and all scheduled maintenance has been performed at the dealership.
